name: Jumpah
short_description: Take the title for the fastest Jumpah alive, and in the process make your friends hate their lives! Parkour, Spleef, Rage, anger, frustration, despair, depression, and lots of colors! What more could you ask for? New maps and game modes coming soon :)
detailed_description: You're a futuristic alien species on earth and your objective is to make it to the finish line in the fastest time possible, however on your way to the finish line you will encounter obstacles and sharp objects that will send you back to where you started. . Send screenshots to the discord and compare with other players to see who is the best jumpah! (i am not liable for any broken computer equipment) I am a new developer with big plans for this game, if you encounter any bugs i strongly encourage you share them to the discord and i will fix it ASAP. New levels coming very soon. Multiplayer is in beta and you can play with your friends today!
